pageContext.name: Yuta Okkotsu (0 Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya are excited to present a 1:8 scale figure from Jujutsu Kaisen 0, Yuta Okkotsu!  Yuta Okkotsu from Jujutsu Kaisen 0 comes to life in a 1:8 scale figure posed ready for battle and gripping his sword. He stands at 6.89' tall and is seen wearing his loose white jacket and black pants.  Be sure to add this Yuta Okkotsu Collectible Statue to Jujutsu Kaisen collection today!
